description: This file defines a TypeScript class 'LambdaFunction' that extends AWS CDK's Construct class. It encapsulates the creation and configuration of an AWS Lambda function with associated monitoring and deployment settings, including environment variables, layers, and CloudWatch alarms.

classes.name: LambdaFunction
classes.description: A CDK construct that creates a Python-based AWS Lambda function with monitoring and deployment configurations.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the LambdaFunction construct, setting up the Lambda function, layers, environment variables, alias, and error alarm.
